title: `.helm.json` workflow export/import (HELM-PHASE3-BUILD-SPEC.md P3-W11, §3.4)
description: Versioned, emailable workflow file. A conformant importer reads format_version first: if it does not recognize the version it MUST emit the refused shape (result=refused) with a human-readable reason and MUST NOT attempt a partial or best-effort import — n8n's silent-mangle-on-version-skew failure mode is the thing this schema exists to prevent. secrets_stripped is always true; env_overlays inside workflow (if present) carry vault_ref pointers only, never literal secret values (mirrors workflow-manifest.schema.json's env_overlays discipline).

workflow_manifest.description: The full workflow-manifest.schema.json document, embedded verbatim; its digest MUST equal workflow_manifest_digest above. Validated separately against schema/workflow-manifest.schema.json — this shape check does not re-descend into it (D2 zero-dep, no cross-file $ref).

format_version.description: The (unrecognized or unsupported) version actually found in the file, echoed back for the user.
